title: Display Dynamic Object Title on Detail Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see a dynamic page title that reflects the current view mode and Salesforce object, so that I always know what data I am looking at.
description:
The object detail page needs a dynamic title that updates based on the active view and selected object. The title format is:

`[View Mode] - [Object Label] ([Object API Name])`

Examples:
- Migration - Lead (Lead)
- Dictionary - Lead (Lead)
- Migration - Custom Object (Custom_Object__c)

The title must update when toggling between Migration and Dictionary views without a page reload.
acceptance_criteria: Page title displays in the format: '[View Mode] - [Object Label] ([API Name])'
Title updates dynamically when switching between Migration and Dictionary views
Object label and API name are both displayed
Custom objects display with their full API name including the __c suffix
ux_changes: Dynamic page title label shows the current view mode (Migration or Dictionary) alongside the Salesforce object label and API name. Updates on view toggle.
implementation_notes: Title is rendered from the object metadata already loaded on the page. JavaScript updates the title text when the view toggle fires.
comment_summary: Product owner clarified the requirements after initially forgetting to save ticket details. Title needed to update when clicking Migration or Dictionary toggle. Developer implemented and submitted for review.
